testcase.name: test_birth_acts_import_logic
testcase.error:
Tests\Feature\ExcelImportTest::test_birth_acts_import_logic Illuminate\Database\QueryException: SQLSTATE[23514]: Check violation: 7 ERROR: new row for relation "registries" violates check constraint "registries_status_check" DETAIL: Failing row contains (1, 1, naissance, 2026, REG, 0, ouvert, null, null, 2026-05-12 14:50:52, 2026-05-12 14:50:52). (Connection: pgsql, SQL: insert into "registries" ("civil_registration_center_id", "type", "year", "reference_prefix", "last_number", "status", "updated_at", "created_at") values (1, naissance, 2026, REG, 0, ouvert, 2026-05-12 14:50:52, 2026-05-12 14:50:52) returning "id")
